

# small_sky_healpix13 HATS Catalog 

This is the HATS catalog for small_sky_healpix13.

### Access the catalog

We recommend the use of the [LSDB](https://lsdb.io) Python framework to access HATS catalogs.
LSDB can be installed via `pip install lsdb` or `conda install conda-forge::lsdb`,
see more details [in the docs](https://docs.lsdb.io/).
The following code provides a minimal example of opening this catalog:

```python
import lsdb

# Full sky coverage.
catalog = lsdb.open_catalog("<PATH>")
# One-degree cone.
catalog = lsdb.open_catalog(
    "<PATH>",
    search_filter=lsdb.ConeSearch(ra=306.0, dec=-50.0, radius_arcsec=3600.0),
)
```

This catalog is represented as an [Apache Parquet dataset](https://arrow.apache.org/docs/python/dataset.html) and can be accessed with a variety of tools, including `pandas`, `pyarrow`, `dask`, `Spark`, `DuckDB`.

### File structure

This catalog is represented by the following files and directories:

- [`small_sky_healpix13/`](.) — HATS catalog directory
  - [`dataset/`](dataset/) — Apache Parquet dataset directory
    - ... parquet metadata and data files in sub directories ...
  - [`hats.properties`](hats.properties) — textual metadata file describing this HATS catalog
  - [`partition_info.csv`](partition_info.csv) — CSV file with a list of catalog HEALPix tiles (catalog partitions)
  - [`skymap.fits`](skymap.fits) — HEALPix skymap FITS file with row-counts per HEALPix tile of fixed order 2

### Catalog metadata

Catalog metadata:

| **Number of rows** | **Number of columns** | **Number of partitions** | **HATS Builder** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 131 | 5 | 1 | hats-import v0.6.6, hats v0.6.6 |


### Catalog columns

The main HATS catalog contains the following columns:

| **Name** |  **`id`** | **`ra`** | **`dec`** | **`ra_error`** | **`dec_error`** | **`healpix13`** |
| --- |  --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Data Type** |  int64 | double | double | int64 | int64 | int64 |
| **Example row** |  711 | 305.5 | -49.5 | 0 | 0 | 776236455 |
| **Minimum value** |  700 | 280.5 | -69.5 | 0 | 0 | 7.421e+08 |
| **Maximum value** |  830 | 350.5 | -25.5 | 0 | 0 | 7.973e+08 |
